philippines.title: Pope Leo says he does not fear Trump, cites Gospel
philippines.description:
ABOARD THE PAPAL PLANE — U.S.-born Pope Leo XIV pushed back Monday on President Donald Trump’s broadside against him over the U.S.-Israel war in Iran, telling reporters that the Vatican’s appeals for peace and reconciliation are rooted in the Gospel, and that he doesn’t fear the Trump administration. “To put my message on the same plane as what the president has attempted to do here, I think is not understanding what the message of the Gospel is,” Leo told The Associated Press aboard the papal plane en route to Algeria. “And I’m sorry to hear that but I will continue […]...
Keep on reading: Pope Leo says he does not fear Trump, cites Gospel

philippines.title: USJ-R, UC win big in Cesafi Esports MLBB playoffs
philippines.description:
The University of San Jose-Recoletos (USJ-R) Adelante Jaguars and the University of Cebu (UC) Main Webmasters delivered crucial victories in the Cesafi Esports League (CEL) Season 4 Mobile Legends: Bang Bang (MLBB) playoffs over the weekend at the Cebu Institute of Technology-University (CIT-U) campus....
Keep on reading: USJ-R, UC win big in Cesafi Esports MLBB playoffs

philippines.title: Why more young homebuyers are choosing the North to start their next chapter
philippines.description:
A new generation of Filipino homebuyers is redefining where—and how—they begin the next chapter of their lives, with the North emerging as an increasingly compelling choice. From Bulacan to key growth corridors such as Pampanga, young professionals, newlyweds, and first-time investors are gravitating toward communities that offer not only affordability but also long-term value, mobility, and the promise of a future still in the making as they are fast becoming prime residential destinations and investment hotspots because they offer a strong mix of affordability, opportunity, and lifestyle upgrade.  No longer seen as mere alternatives to Metro Manila’s traditional southern enclaves, […]...
Keep on reading: Why more young homebuyers are choosing the North to start their next chapter

energy.title: Eni CEO Calls for Suspending EU Ban on Russian LNG
energy.description: The European Union needs to suspend its planned ban on imports of Russian LNG, currently slated to take place on January 1, 2027, as the Middle East war has roiled energy markets, according to Claudio Descalzi, the chief executive of Italy’s oil and gas major Eni. “I think that it is necessary to suspend the ban that will take place from January 1, 2027 on LNG supply coming from Russia,” Descalzi said at an event on Sunday. “I am not suggesting that the ban should be totally abandoned, but it needs to be suspended or further…

energy.title: Inpex Boosts Condensate from LNG Project to Bolster Australia's Fuel Supply
energy.description: Inpex, the Japanese energy firm that operates the Ichthys LNG plant offshore Western Australia, is raising condensate supply from the project to the local Australian market, which grapples with a fuel crisis in the wake of the Middle East war. Inpex on Monday said that it "is taking decisive action to support Australia's fuel security by making additional Ichthys condensate cargoes available to domestic refiners, helping ensure reliable fuel supply amid ongoing global uncertainty." A condensate cargo of about 630,000 barrels will depart from Ichthys…
